subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, the True Sovereign, the Manifest, revealed through grace unto all who are in the heavens and on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله الملک الحق المبین نزلت بالفضل علی من فی السموات و الارضین
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
